fields.name: Lip Balm
fields.description: Lip balm is a moisturizing treatment designed to soothe and protect dry, chapped lips. It forms a nourishing barrier to lock in hydration and keep lips soft and smooth.

fields.name: Duo Mink Hair Eyebrows
fields.description: Duo Mink Hair Fake Eyebrows are realistic, reusable brow enhancements made from soft mink hair to mimic natural eyebrow texture. They offer a quick and easy way to achieve fuller, well-defined brows without permanent makeup.

fields.name: Perfume Refill
fields.description: Perfume refills are eco-friendly, cost-effective alternatives that allow you to replenish your favorite fragrance without buying a new bottle. They help reduce waste while ensuring you always have your signature scent on hand.

fields.name: Stickons
fields.description: Nail stickons are pre-designed adhesive nail coverings that offer a quick and easy way to achieve salon-style manicures at home. They come in various colors, patterns, and finishes, sticking directly to the nails without the need for polish or drying time.

fields.name: Asante Soaps
fields.description: Asante Soaps are handcrafted, natural soaps made with nourishing ingredients like shea butter, essential oils, and herbal extracts. They gently cleanse the skin while promoting hydration, leaving it soft, refreshed, and delicately scented.

fields.name: Brass Rings
fields.description: Brass rings are durable and stylish accessories made from a copper-zinc alloy, known for their warm golden hue and vintage appeal. They are often used in jewelry, crafts, or hardware, offering both aesthetic charm and long-lasting strength.

fields.name: Laundry Basket
fields.description: Reed Laundry Basket is a stylish and functional storage solution made from natural reed materials, offering durability and a rustic charm. Ideal for organizing laundry, it combines breathable design with aesthetic appeal, perfect for home decor and practical use.

fields.name: Vaseline Body Oil
fields.description: Vaseline Body Oil is a lightweight, fast-absorbing moisturizer that deeply nourishes and hydrates the skin. Infused with healing ingredients like pure Vaseline jelly or cocoa butter, it leaves the skin soft, smooth, and glowing without a greasy feel.

fields.name: Body Mist
fields.description: Body mist is a light, refreshing fragrance spray designed for all-over body use, offering a subtle scent that lingers without being overpowering. It often contains moisturizing ingredients to hydrate the skin while providing a gentle burst of aroma.

fields.name: Moroccan Oil
fields.description: Moroccan oil is a nutrient-rich hair treatment infused with argan oil, known for its ability to deeply hydrate, smooth, and add shine to all hair types. It helps reduce frizz, improve manageability, and protect against heat and environmental damage.

fields.name: Luodais Professional Salon
fields.description: Luodais Professional Salon is a premium haircare brand known for salon-quality styling products and treatments. It offers solutions like hair serums, sprays, and oils designed to nourish, protect, and enhance hair's natural shine and manageability.

fields.name: Dr Rashel Face Cream
fields.description: Dr Rashel Face Cream is a nourishing skincare product designed to hydrate, brighten, and even out the skin tone. Infused with natural ingredients like vitamins and plant extracts, it helps reduce signs of aging, fade dark spots, and improve overall skin texture for a radiant glow.

fields.name: Skin Products
fields.description: We have affordable skin products like collagen and Mary Kay to replenish your natural skin beauty.

fields.name: Hair Combs
fields.description: New combs designed to give your hair a beautiful look in no time

fields.name: Medicated Fade Cream with Sunscreen
fields.description: This fade creme is best for you to keep your skin even-toned for a smooth complexion.

fields.name: Pink Dress
fields.description: Dress for the occasion

fields.name: Red Handbag
fields.description: This handbag features a bold red design, making a striking statement with its vibrant color. Its sleek and durable construction ensures both style and practicality, perfect for adding a pop of elegance to any outfit.

fields.name: Leopard Spots & Leather
fields.description: This handbag exudes bold elegance with its premium leather construction and striking leopard print accents. Perfect for adding a touch of wild sophistication to any outfit, it combines durability with a stylish edge, making it a versatile statement piece for any occasion.

fields.name: Leather Handbag
fields.description: This handbag features a sleek, modern design with a classic black leather finish and subtle square patterns for a refined touch. Its structured shape and durable material make it a versatile accessory that effortlessly complements both casual and formal outfits.

fields.name: Brown leather and Cheetah Spots
fields.description: This handbag showcases a bold yet sophisticated design, featuring rich brown leather paired with striking cheetah spots. Its textured finish adds a dynamic touch, making it a versatile statement piece that blends elegance with a wild edge.

fields.name: Kiondo
fields.description: This kiondo bag features a beautiful blend of brown and tan tones, woven from durable sisal with a classic Kenyan design. Its structured shape and earthy colors make it a stylish and practical accessory for both casual and formal occasions.

fields.name: Brown and Grey Leather Handbag
fields.description: This handbag features a sophisticated blend of brown and grey leather, offering a timeless and versatile design. Its durable construction and neutral tones make it a stylish accessory for both casual and formal occasions.

fields.name: Grey Handbag
fields.description: This handbag features a sleek grey leather design, offering a modern and versatile look. Its durable construction and understated elegance make it a perfect accessory for both casual and formal occasions.

fields.name: Hairdressing
fields.full_description: We offer high-quality hairdressing services tailored to meet the needs of our valued clients.

fields.name: Hair Cuts
fields.full_description: We provide popular haircut services. Our barber is highly skilled with many years of experience.

fields.name: Stickons
fields.full_description: We provide nails services to give you the best nails available in our inventory.

fields.description: Get a 25% discount on your Halloween braiding service at Kenrish Collection. See you Oct. 31 for the offer.
